'''zashoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feardie|feardie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feardie|feardie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zashoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæsheteth|zæsheteth]] || [[word:zæshetej|zæshetej]] || [[word:zæshetesh|zæshetesh]] || [[word:zæshete|zæshete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zashoshototh|zashoshototh]] || [[word:zashoshotoj|zashoshotoj]] || [[word:zashoshotosh|zashoshotosh]] || [[word:zashoshoto|zashoshoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zashototh|zashototh]] || [[word:zashotoj|zashotoj]] || [[word:zashotosh|zashotosh]] || [[word:zashoto|zashoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zashoftoth|zashoftoth]] || [[word:zashoftoj|zashoftoj]] || [[word:zashoftosh|zashoftosh]] || [[word:zashoftof|zashoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zashototho|zashototho]] || [[word:zashotojo|zashotojo]] || [[word:zashotosho|zashotosho]] || [[word:zashotoko|zashotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zashototh|zashototh]] || [[word:zashotoj|zashotoj]] || [[word:zashotosh|zashotosh]] || [[word:zashoto|zashoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zashotothol|zashotothol]] || [[word:zashotojol|zashotojol]] || [[word:zashotoshol|zashotoshol]] || [[word:zashotokol|zashotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zashotothotho|zashotothotho]] || [[word:zashotojojo|zashotojojo]] || [[word:zashotoshosho|zashotoshosho]] || [[word:zashotoko|zashotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zashotothon|zashotothon]] || [[word:zashotojon|zashotojon]] || [[word:zashotoshon|zashotoshon]] || [[word:zashotokon|zashotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zashotothoro|zashotothoro]] || [[word:zashotojoro|zashotojoro]] || [[word:zashotoshoro|zashotoshoro]] || [[word:zashotokoro|zashotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
